title: styrax racemosus
intro: Styrax racemosus, also known as the Indian styrax or styrax, is a plant species belonging to the family Styracaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Styrax racemosus include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Styrax racemosus include tinctures, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health ailments.
